'''shazhïfhïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sqn|sqn]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-zh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sqn|sqn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| shazhïfhïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || shazhïfhïfth || shazhïfhïfj || shazhïfhïfsh || shazhïfhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || shazhïfzhïfhïfth || shazhïfzhïfhïfj || shazhïfzhïfhïfsh || shazhïfzhïfhïf
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || shazhïfhïfïf || shazhïfhïfïf || shazhïfhïfïf || shazhïfhïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || shazhïfhïfth || shazhïfhïfj || shazhïfhïfsh || shazhïfhïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || shazhïfhïfïfl || shazhïfhïfïfl || shazhïfhïfïfl || shazhïfhïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || shazhïfhïfïfïf || shazhïfhïfïfïf || shazhïfhïfïfïf || shazhïfhïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || shazhïfhïfïfn || shazhïfhïfïfn || shazhïfhïfïfn || shazhïfhïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || shazhïfhïfïforo || shazhïfhïfïforo || shazhïfhïfïforo || shazhïfhïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|086b4c8}}
